home.eyebrow: Strategic litigation · Rio · Brasília · São Paulo
home.heading: Decisive litigation demands strategy from the start.
home.lede: We are a boutique firm focused on strategic litigation. We take on a limited number of cases, with direct partner involvement and strategy designed case by case.
home.areasLede: High-impact matters where the outcome depends on technical reading and how the argument is built.
home.teamLede: A lean team with partners directly engaged in every matter.
home.publicationsLede: Technical positions and case-law readings authored by the firm.
home.closingHeading: When the litigation is decisive, speak to those who lead it.
home.closingLede: Schedule a conversation with the partners.

firm.heading: An institution built on selectivity.
firm.lede: Franceschini operates by choice — not volume. Each matter receives the technical depth its impact demands.
firm.missionBody: To act as strategic counsel to clients facing litigation that is decisive to their businesses and assets — with rigorous technical reading, argumentative depth, and direct partner presence.

values.title: Real selectivity
values.body: We accept a limited number of matters each year to guarantee depth on every one.

values.title: Strategy before tactics
values.body: Each case begins with an honest reading of the scenario — then we build the strategy.

values.title: Leadership presence
values.body: Partners are directly involved in decisions and execution.

values.title: Institutional discretion
values.body: We work away from the noise. Outcome matters more than visibility.

firm.architectureBody: Franceschini Advogados Associados is an autonomous institution. Its intellectual leadership gathers professionals with their own trajectories — including its founder, Helem Franceschini, whose technical authority shapes the firm's positioning but does not exhaust it.

team.heading: Technical depth, direct presence.
team.lede: Intentionally lean. Every matter is led with active partner involvement.

practice.heading: Four areas where strategy outweighs volume.
practice.lede: Our focus is litigation where the outcome depends on how the case is built — not just how it is defended.
practice.approachBody: We treat every matter as a unique scenario. The first step is to understand what is at stake — for the client and for the sector. The strategy is built from there.

publications.heading: Technical readings and positions.
publications.lede: Articles and case-law analysis written by the firm.

contact.heading: Let's talk about your case.
contact.lede: Send a message or schedule a meeting directly. We reply within two business days.
contact.schedulingBody: Initial meetings are led by the firm's founder. Pick a slot on the calendar.
contact.formSuccess: Message received. We'll respond within two business days.
contact.formError: We couldn't send your message. Please email helem@helemfranceschini.com directly.
contact.formConsent: I agree with the Privacy Policy and the processing of my data to respond to this contact.
contact.officeHoursBody: Monday to Friday · 9 am to 6 pm (Brasília time)

cookies.title: About cookies on this site
cookies.body: We use cookies to understand site usage and improve navigation. You can accept all or essentials only.

notFound.heading: Page not found.
notFound.lede: The address you accessed does not exist or has been removed.
